class.name: QueryItem2D
class.brief_description: Holds item information, such as [member score], [member projection_position] and [member collided_with].
class.description: Holds item information, such as [member score], [member projection_position] and [member collided_with].

method.name: add_score
method.description: Adds to the current score of this item.

method.name: create
method.description: Make a [QueryItem3D] with a [param position] and a [param collider]

members.member: The node this query item is attached to. It could be the ground, an enemy, or any node that could be of interest for the testing phase. This is provided by [QueryGenerator3D]s.
If [code]true[/code], exclude this item from the tests and results.
The point of contact of this item. This is provided by [QueryGenerator3D]s.
Current score of this item. These are normalized at the testing phase.
